- Plan: Navigate character to overlap the yellow L-shape. Do 11 RIGHTs first (to avoid collision with dark object), then 10 DOWNs.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the character has rotated. The character was originally an L-shape with the long part going down and the short part going right. Now it appears to be rotated - the long part goes right and the short part goes up. The character's bounding box changed from (45,51)-(53,59) to (42,51)-(50,59), so it moved up 3 rows but stayed at the same columns.
ACTION7 seems to rotate the character. Let me look at the image more carefully:
- Before: character was at (45,51)-(53,59), L-shape pointing down-right
- After: character is at (42,51)-(50,59), appears rotated
The character now has white dots at the top row and a yellow dot somewhere. Looking at the image, the character seems to have rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
Now I need to figure out if this rotation is the key to completing the level. The yellow L-shape target is at (45,51)-(53,59). The character is now at (42,51)-(50,59). If I rotate again, maybe the character will match the yellow L-shape's orientation.
Let me try ACTION7 again to rotate once more and see what happens.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try ACTION7 again to rotate more
action(['ACTION7'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
